# Ashitosh Lavhate — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio website of Ashitosh Lavhate, a Full-Stack Developer and UI/UX Designer from India.

## About

Ashitosh Lavhate is a software engineer and full-stack web developer specializing in building production-ready digital products. He focuses on clean design, reliable performance, and intuitive user experiences. He is passionate about technology, innovation, and turning ideas into reality through code.

## Skills & Tech Stack

### Frontend Development
- React.js, Next.js, Bootstrap
- Figma (UI/UX Design)
- GSAP animations, Framer Motion

### Backend Development
- Express.js, Node.js, Django

### Core Programming Languages
- Python, Java, C, C++, JavaScript

### Database & Backend Services
- SQL, MongoDB, Firebase, Supabase

### Tools & Platforms
- Git, GitHub, Vercel, Tableau, Ultimaker Cura

### Preferred Tools
- Figma, Firebase, Supabase, React, Next.js, Vercel, Git, GitHub

## Projects

### DoOrDue
- URL: https://doordue.vercel.app
- Source: https://github.com/ashitoshh01/do-or-due
- Description: A discipline-focused to-do app built to help people stop procrastinating and actually finish what they start. It turns tasks into real commitments by adding accountability, proof-based completion, and consequences.

### ReachFirst
- URL: https://reachfirst.vercel.app
- Source: https://github.com/ashitoshh01/office-do-or-due
- Description: An automation app that simplifies communication between teachers and students. It helps manage announcements, assignments, and group updates in one organized place.

### OfficeOrDue
- URL: https://officeordue.vercel.app
- Source: https://github.com/ashitoshh01/office-do-or-due
- Description: A productivity and accountability platform designed for office teams. It helps employees stay focused, track responsibilities, and build a culture of ownership.

### DishGuru
- URL: https://dish-guru.vercel.app
- Description: A smart food discovery app that understands the user's mood before suggesting what to eat. Uses AI to recommend dishes based on how the user feels.

## Site Info

- Built with: React, Vite, GSAP, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- Hosted on: Vercel
- Contact form powered by: Resend
